content.en:
"This is the mother !! dragon worm"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor and some other Heavenly Ancestors came to Ye Tian's place, and they were shocked when they saw that Ye Tian had already beaten the True Dragon Worm Mother to the point that it was about to fall.

They could sense that the strength of this True Dragon Worm Mother had reached the Boundary-Breaking Level, and Ye Tian was able to severely damage the Boundary-Breaking True Dragonworm Mother here, what an amazing strength this was!

"I've seen all Heavenly Ancestors!"

Ye Tian greeted politely.

"I've seen the Endless Great Ancestor!"

These Heavenly Ancestors are also very polite.

"Is this true dragon worm mother going to be killed?" Ye Tian asked.

"Kill it!" one of the Heavenly Ancestors suggested, "It's a scourge to keep it, and there will be some Heavenly Ancestors who have other thoughts!"

"Okay!"

Ye Tian used the Heaven Killing Blade to kill the dying True Dragon Insect Mother with a direct blow.

At this point, this true dragon worm mother, which had not yet fully grown, fell here.

"Let's go, let's go chase after the Sycamore Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian and the other Heavenly Ancestors quickly shuttled to pursue the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

......

On the way to escape, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor encountered several Heavenly Ancestors chasing him, but those Heavenly Ancestors did not want to fight hard, so he fled.

Now, he knew that he had no other way, he had angered all the Heavenly Ancestors, and now he had no choice but to flee to the territorial waters.

Only by escaping there did he have a chance of survival.

Otherwise, with the style of those Heavenly Ancestors, they would definitely destroy him, and it would be useless to beg for mercy.

However, to get to the boundary gap of the territorial waters, you must enter one node at a time, and there is still some distance from the nearest node.

Escape!

Escape!

Escape!

Gradually, he got closer and closer to that point, and he saw hope of survival.

Just then, a voice came.

"Hey, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, why did you die to cultivate something like the True Dragon Insect Mother, isn't it good to be a Heavenly Ancestor?"

As soon as the words fell, the void of the Infinite Realm Ruins trembled, and a figure walked out.

"Dongao Tianzu !!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor looked desperate, what he was most worried about happened, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor came in person.

"Hahaha, Dongao Tianzu, you have taken this step, you naturally say that you are at ease. But I don't want to stay in the ranks of ordinary Heavenly Ancestors all the time, I also want to be strong, I have no hope at all, and I happened to meet the real dragon insect female worm egg, if you are in such a situation as me, you will also be excited!" Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said.

Dongao Tianzu did not refute, but said lightly: "It's a pity, you failed!"

"Yes, I failed, if I succeed and no longer let the True Dragon Worm Mother devour the living beings, after endless years, no one will remember this matter now, only respect. But as long as I fail, I have to die!" Wutong Heavenly Ancestor laughed miserably, and then begged again: "Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, can you give me a chance, we used to have a good relationship, and I even helped you." As long as you let me go, I will leave Wanlong's territorial waters, escape directly into the cracks of territorial waters, and never come back!"

"Do you want to go to the territorial waters? With your strength, you only have a 1 in 10,000 chance of surviving if you go there, but you still have a chance to live. In the unlikely event that you are still alive and find the opportunity to grow to my point, I cannot guarantee that you will not take revenge!" said Dongao Tianzu.

This has been said very clearly, he will not let go of Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

Wutong Tianzu also heard it, but this place was very close to entering the boundary of the territorial waters, and he didn't want to give up!

Thereupon.

He sacrificed all the treasures that could trap people or delay time at the same time, just to delay the time of Dongao Tianzu for an instant.

Rumble!!!!!

After Wutong Heavenly Ancestor made a move, he immediately burned the immeasurable blood and immeasurable bone explosion of his whole body and rushed towards the node at the fastest speed.

However.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor directly exploded these treasures of Wutong Heavenly Ancestor with one hand.

"Dare to make a move on me, you have a lot of courage!"

Dongao Tianzu stepped over and immediately pointed out.

The void around Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was frozen, and immediately his body was directly pierced by a finger.

This finger made the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor die of heavy injuries, and completely lost the hope of escaping.

He had never fought against a Heavenly Ancestor of the realm of Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, and now it was the first time, and he also knew that the gap between them was simply too big.

"Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, I won't kill you now, when the other Heavenly Ancestors arrive, I will kill them in front of them!"

Dongao Tianzu said.

It's a shock!

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor completely understood, this was the best Liwei since the breakthrough of Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, so that other Heavenly Ancestors understood the strength of Dongao Heavenly Ancestor!

Of course, among the many realms in the Wanlong territorial waters, Dongao Tianzu is not the strongest, but he is the most active one, and other existences whose strength is no less than Dongao Tianzu are all silently retreated, and they do not appear for endless years.

Soon.

One Heavenly Ancestor came here, and Ye Tian also came.

When they saw the hard-hit Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and the Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, they understood that it was the Dongao Heavenly Ancestor who made the move.

"Fortunately, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor made a move, otherwise I am afraid that it would have really been cracked by Wutong Heavenly Ancestor escaping into the territorial sea boundary!" said a Heavenly Ancestor.

Territorial waters?

Ye Tian heard of this place for the first time, but he didn't ask, and he would find out about it later.

After many Heavenly Ancestors came, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor directly killed Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

That's the end of it!

......

Genki Territory.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor is back.

Ever since the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was killed, he was no longer grounded by Falcon Dragon City.

After he came back, he heard about the killing of Wutong Tianzu, and he was immediately embarrassed.

"No wonder that Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was so crazy at the beginning, he had to desperately obtain the True Dragon Suke, it turned out to be to cultivate the True Dragon Worm Mother!"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor suddenly realized.

In addition, he also knew that being able to find the True Dragon Worm Mother this time was all due to the Endless Great Ancestor.

Moreover, the Endless Great Ancestor also killed the Boundary-Breaking True Dragon Worm Mother alone, which shocked him incomparably.

Subsequently, he came to visit Ye Tian.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, come in!"

Ye Tian let the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor enter his ruin stone tower.

"Thank you Endless Ancestor this time, if it weren't for you, I'm afraid I would have to be imprisoned in Falcon Dragon City for a long time!" the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor thanked.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor is polite, this matter will definitely be found out anyway, it is impossible for Falcon Dragon City to imprison you all the time!" Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the two chatted happily.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked, "Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, where is the boundary gap in the territorial waters?"
